meaning: v.弄坏,毁坏,损害n.损伤,毁损,障碍n.(Mar) 三月(=March)
examples: The grandmother remained silent, not to mar the happiness of the child.
Baha Mar, a $2.6 billion project in Nassau that would have employed 4,400 building workers, has been stopped by the withdrawal of its American casino partner.
Open: 29 Mar-29 Oct, Sun to Thurs.
We are already (see FORBES, Mar. 23, p. 124) witnessing declines in the quality of earnings.
As Northwest filed for bankruptcy on Mar. 15, 2005, Honda made a leap of faith.
